title: clausena yunnanensis var. yunnanensis
intro: Clausena yunnanensis var. yunnanensis is a species of plant in the Rutaceae family, commonly known as the Yunnan Clausena or Yunnanese Clausena. It is native to the mountainous regions of Yunnan, China, and is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties. Clausena yunnanensis var. yunnanensis is valued for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which are believed to provide various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving digestion. The plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses, and its essential oil is also used in traditional Chinese medicine and aromatherapy.
